geographic_restrictions: Greater Philadelphia (Bucks, Chester, Delaware, Montgomery and Philadelphia counties in PA or Burlington and Camden counties in N.J.)
demographic_requirements: Black-led (chief executive or board chair identifies as Black) and serving predominantly Black communities (51% or more of constituency or residents served are Black)
eligibility_summary: Organizations must be 501(c)(3) status, have one year of financial data, be Black-led (chief executive or board chair identifies as Black with demonstrated commitment to Black inclusion and leadership), serve predominantly Black communities (51% or more), and be committed to strengthening programs, operations, and governance to better serve Black communities. Located in and serving Greater Philadelphia.
